2190680.name: Goofy Dee
2190680.description:
Something is happening in the neighborhood...
Help the Detective solve the mystery.

Play as The Detective and seek evidence and clues to solve the mystery of the Billy Case and find the guilty of this terrible crime.

-Talk with the neighbors to ask for information about what they saw.
-Avoid aggressive enemies
-Use Detective weapons to find who is behind this

Besides billy, There are other mysteries happening in the G building. The people are starting to get crazy and aggressive.
2190680.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
